title: Lane 3 forest expedition spatial depth
summary: Add or prove one next forest canopy, trunk, or under-root spatial memory beat without new systems.

execution_order.goal: Scope a forest expedition spatial pass from existing canopy/cave proof.
execution_order.why_now: Forest already proves a recoverable loop; the next beat should be chosen carefully.

execution_order.goal: Implement or proof the scoped forest expedition spatial beat.
execution_order.why_now: Forest can carry the game's strongest exploration-forward feeling.

execution_order.goal: Review the forest spatial pass for readability, recovery, and no framework drift.
execution_order.why_now: Vertical wonder should stay cozy and controlled.

completion_gate: One forest spatial beat is improved or proof-closed.
Browser proof covers any visual geometry or placement change.
No cave framework, route-board logic, station work, or physics rewrite lands.
guardrails: Do not add a traversal HUD.
post_packet_path: If clean, proceed to high-country vertical memory.
If content is needed, hand it to lane 2.

scout_494_handoff.target: Proof-close the Forest expedition upper-run carry from the filtered-return mouth through the high-run bridge/hinge band into the old-growth main trunk foot.
scout_494_handoff.proof_summary: Fresh native 256x160 scout frames show the filtered-return mouth, high-run bridge/hinge band, and old-growth trunk foot already read as a physical route. No real spatial readability issue is proven yet.
main_494_contract: Recreate the upper-run carry in a fresh browser proof: filtered-return mouth -> high-run bridge/hinge -> old-growth trunk foot.
Treat proof closure as a valid completion if the fresh frames stay readable.

If fresh proof shows a real placement issue, apply only one tiny Forest-local geometry or existing-carrier fix around log-run-high-run-log, creek-bend-high-run-log, old-growth-crossover-limb, or the old-growth-main-trunk foot.
Do not edit station, route-board or route-catalog semantics, save schema, content-only surfaces, traversal framework, physics, or add a new cave, biome, route beat, or traversal HUD.
suggested_checks: npm run build if runtime code changes land

main_494_result.proof_summary: Fresh browser proof walked the existing Forest expedition upper-run carry from filtered-return mouth through log-run high carry and old-growth bridge/hinge into the old-growth main trunk foot. All frames are native 256x160, the hinge cue and trunk climb are readable, and errors.json is empty.
verification: npm run build was not run because no runtime source files changed

critic_494_review.summary: The Forest expedition upper-run carry is proof-closed without runtime changes. Fresh native 256x160 proof walked filtered-return mouth through log-run high carry and old-growth bridge/hinge into the old-growth main trunk foot, with the hinge cue visible, the trunk climb in range, and no browser errors.
verification_reviewed: Proof assertions over output/lane-3-main-494-forest-expedition-spatial-proof/summary.json, assertions.json, and errors.json

Implementation report verification: npm test -- --run src/test/forest-biome.test.ts -t "high-run carry|old-growth|root-hollow"; npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t "high run|old-growth|Root Hollow|upper-return"
